We look forward to hearing from you and accommodating your needs to the best of our ability.</em></p></div>

jobs.title: AI Research Engineer – Datadog AI Research (DAIR)
jobs.description: <p>As a Research Engineer on our team, you will partner with Research Scientists to turn research ideas into working systems, building the data, tooling, and infrastructure that enable rapid iteration, trustworthy evaluation, and a smooth path from prototype to production.</p> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <p>Building on our track record of AI-powered solutions (e.g., <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/blog/bits-ai-sre/">Bits AI</a>, <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/blog/engineering/self-optimizing-system/">Bits Evolve</a>, and our <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/blog/ai/toto-boom-unleashed/">time series foundation model</a>), Datadog AI Research tackles high-risk, high-reward problems grounded in real-world challenges in cloud observability and security.</p> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <p>We are focused on two research areas:</p> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <ol> <li><strong>World Models for Observability</strong> -- Training multimodal foundation models that learn the joint dynamics of distributed systems across metrics, traces, logs, topology, and events. These models power advanced forecasting, anomaly detection, root cause analysis, counterfactual simulation ("what if?"), and provide a learned planning backbone for our autonomous agents.</li> <li><strong>Trained Agents for Observability</strong>-- Post-training models to operate autonomously across Datadog's domain. SRE incident response is our first target, with a clear path to code repair, security response, and infrastructure optimization. We build the simulation environments, RL training loops, and evaluation infrastructure needed to train agents that match or surpass frontier models at a fraction of the cost.</li> </ol> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What You'll Do:</strong></p> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Build and operate multimodal data pipelines, training and evaluation infrastructure, benchmarks, and internal tooling</li> <li>Implement models, run experiments at scale, and profile for reliability, performance, and cost</li> <li>Build simulation environments and replay infrastructure for agent training and evaluation</li> <li>Orchestrate distributed training and distributed RL with Ray, including scheduling, scaling, and failure recovery</li> <li>Establish rigorous automated benchmarks and regression tests for world model predictions, agent performance, and simulation fidelity</li> <li>Collaborate with Research Scientists, Product, and Engineering to integrate capabilities into Datadog's products and to harden prototypes into reliable services</li> <li>Contribute to research publications at top-tier conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, ICLR, ICML), and produce high-quality code, documentation, and open-source artifacts</li> </ul> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true"><br><br></p> <p><strong>Who You Are:</strong></p> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>You have depth in distributed computing, RL Infra, and ML systems for training and inference at scale; experience with Ray, Slurm, or similar frameworks is a plus</li> <li>You are proficient in Python, familiar with a systems language (e.g., Rust, C++, or Go), and comfortable with modern cloud and data infrastructure</li> <li>You have practical experience implementing and operating ML training and inference systems (e.g., PyTorch or JAX), including containerization, orchestration, and GPU acceleration</li> <li>You have practical experience with large-scale model training and fine-tuning, including frameworks like Megatron-LM, DeepSpeed, SkyRL, VeRL, or TorchTitan, and techniques such as SFT, RLVR, RLHF, and efficient inference (quantization, speculative decoding)</li> <li>You can explain design and performance trade-offs clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences</li> <li>You have experience supporting or contributing to research publications</li> </ul> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Bonus Points (any of the following):</strong></p> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>You have strong software engineering skills with experience in domains such as observability, SRE, or security</li> <li>You have experience bridging research prototypes and real-world product applications, especially with large foundation models, world models, or RL-trained agents</li> <li>You have a passion for pushing the boundaries of AI with a focus on customer impact and scalable deployment</li> <li>You have hands-on experience with GPU programming and optimization, including CUDA</li> <li>You have experience writing production data pipelines and applications</li> <li>You have experience building simulation or sandbox environments for agent training</li> </ul> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <p><em>Datadog values people from all walks of life. We understand not everyone will meet all the above qualifications on day one. That's okay. If you’re passionate about technology and want to grow your skills, we encourage you to apply.</em></p> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Benefits and Growth:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Competitive global benefits&nbsp;</li> <li>New hire stock equity (RSUs) and employee stock purchase plan (ESPP)</li> <li>Opportunity to collaborate closely with colleagues across the Datadog offices in New York City and Paris</li> <li>Opportunity to attend and present at conferences and meetups</li> <li>Intra-departmental mentor and buddy program for in-house networking</li> <li>An inclusive company culture, ability to join our Community Guilds (Datadog employee resource groups)</li> </ul> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <p><em>Benefits and Growth listed above may vary based on the country of your employment and the nature of your employment with Datadog.</em></p> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>About Datadog:&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) is a global SaaS business, delivering a rare combination of growth and profitability. We are on a mission to break down silos and solve complexity in the cloud age by enabling digital transformation, cloud migration, and infrastructure monitoring of our customers’ entire technology stacks. Built by engineers, for engineers, Datadog is used by organizations of all sizes across a wide range of industries. Together, we champion professional development, diversity of thought, innovation, and work excellence to empower continuous growth. Join the pack and become part of a collaborative, pragmatic, and thoughtful people-first community where we solve tough problems, take smart risks, and celebrate one another. Learn more about #DatadogLife on Instagram, LinkedIn, and Datadog Learning Center.</p> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Equal Opportunity at Datadog:</strong></p> <p>Datadog is an Affirmative Action and Equal Opportunity Employer and is proud to offer equal employment opportunity to everyone regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, veteran status, and more. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. Here are our Candidate Legal Notices for your reference.</p> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Your Privacy:</strong></p> <p>Any information you submit to Datadog as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Datadog’s Applicant and Candidate Privacy Notice.</p> <p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">&nbsp;</p> <p style="color: white;">#LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>Datadog offers a competitive salary and equity package, and may include variable compensation. Actual compensation is based on factors such as the candidate's skills, qualifications, and experience. In addition, Datadog offers a wide range of best in class, comprehensive and inclusive employee benefits for this role including healthcare, dental, parental planning, and mental health benefits, a 401(k) plan and match, paid time off, fitness reimbursements, and a discounted employee stock purchase plan.</p></div><div class="title">The reasonably estimated yearly salary for this role at Datadog is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$140,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$400,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><hr> <p><strong>About Datadog:&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) is a global SaaS business, delivering a rare combination of growth and profitability. We are on a mission to break down silos and solve complexity in the cloud age by enabling digital transformation, cloud migration, and infrastructure monitoring of our customers’ entire technology stacks. Built by engineers, for engineers, Datadog is used by organizations of all sizes across a wide range of industries. Together, we champion professional development, diversity of thought, innovation, and work excellence to empower continuous growth. Join the pack and become part of a collaborative, pragmatic, and thoughtful people-first community where we solve tough problems, take smart risks, and celebrate one another. Learn more about #DatadogLife on <a href="https://www.instagram.com/datadoghq/?hl=en" target="_blank">Instagram</a>, <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/datadog" target="_blank">LinkedIn,</a> and <a href="https://learn.datadoghq.com/" target="_blank">Datadog Learning Center. </a></p> <hr> <p data-renderer-start-pos="215"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Equal Opportunity at Datadog:</strong></p> <p>Datadog is proud to offer <a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf" target="_blank">equal employment opportunity</a> to everyone regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, veteran status, and other characteristics protected by law. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. Here are our <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/candidate-legal-notices/" target="_blank">Candidate Legal Notices</a> for your reference.&nbsp;</p> <p>Datadog endeavors to make our Careers Page accessible to all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please complete <a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeoJeduEZ2NdZF_65uZmWUrCM-zee7yADXX1s6Xr9zAGq8iKA/viewform" target="_blank">this form</a>. This form is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications.&nbsp;</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="662"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Privacy and AI Guidelines:</strong></p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="662">Any information you submit to Datadog as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Datadog’s&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/applicant-candidate-privacy/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/applicant-candidate-privacy/" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Applicant and Candidate Privacy Notice</a>. For information on our AI policy, please visit <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/interviewing-at-datadog-ai-guidelines/" target="_blank">Interviewing at Datadog AI Guidelines</a>.</p></div>

jobs.title: Manager I, Engineering - AI Platform - Annotation & Evaluation
jobs.description: <p>The AI platform is responsible for all AI infrastructure across Datadog. Our mission is to&nbsp;provide tools and platforms that enable data scientists and engineers to conduct large-scale training and inference with ease. We support products such as <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/blog/datadog-bits-generative-ai/">Bits AI</a>, <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/product/llm-observability/">LLMObs</a> and all our <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/product/llm-observability/">AI research</a>.&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>As an engineering manager for the Evaluation &amp; Annotation team, you’ll join a new and fast growing team and organization. You will support building and scaling the team, define our technical vision and help shape the roadmap. Your team will lead the charge on multiple critical technical challenges: AI model evaluation both offline and online, designing tooling and processes around human annotation, and establishing the standard around synthetics and AI generated datasets.&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>You’ll work closely with sister teams in the AI platform organization ensuring a seamless AI development cycle. You’ll also partner with the Applied AI org and with Datadog infrastructure &amp; tooling teams to build out systems from the ground up.&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><em>At Datadog, we place value in our office culture - the relationships that it builds, the creativity it brings to the table, and the collaboration of being together. We operate as a hybrid workplace to ensure our employees can create a work-life harmony that best fits them.</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Manage and grow the Evaluation &amp; Annotation team, directly managing 6-8 engineers</li> <li>Define our technical roadmap in alignment with AI platform goals and the Applied AI team roadmap.&nbsp;</li> <li>Work with our core platform teams to tailor Datadog's storage and data pipelines to our needs</li> <li>Create a strong team culture aligned with our engineering standards and our customer focus</li> <li>Participate in hands-on work: Code reviews, design reviews and some coding</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Who You Are:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>A Software Engineer at heart with a previous experience leading software engineering teams, as a tech lead or people manager</li> <li>Excellent leader with strong interpersonal skills, and the ability to build and lead high-performing teams</li> <li>Interested in working on an early stage project with many challenges to solve and a fast iteration cycle</li> <li>You build strong partnerships with cross-functional teams, including engineering, product, and science, and skillfully coordinate among multiple stakeholders</li> <li>You have a track record of delivering high-quality software on schedule and making decisions in ambiguous and fast-paced environments</li> <li>Strong technician with a mix of backend, data engineer and infrastructure experience who is interested in remaining a hands-on leader</li> <li>Datadog values people from all walks of life. We understand not everyone will meet all the above qualifications on day one. That's okay. If you’re passionate about technology and want to grow your skills, we encourage you to apply.&nbsp;</li> <li>You have demonstrated ability to use AI coding tools in day-to-day workflows and validate, critique, and refine AI-generated output</li> <li>Bonus: You’re motivated to push the boundaries of how AI can improve software engineering best practices and contribute to building AI-enabled products</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><em>Datadog values people from all walks of life. We understand not everyone will meet all the above qualifications on day one. That's okay. If you’re passionate about technology and want to grow your skills, we encourage you to apply.&nbsp;</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Benefits and Growth:</strong></p> <ul> <li>New hire stock equity (RSUs) and employee stock purchase plan (ESPP)</li> <li>Continuous professional development, product training, and career pathing</li> <li>Intradepartmental mentor and buddy program for in-house networking</li> <li>An inclusive company culture, ability to join our Community Guilds (Datadog employee resource groups)</li> <li>Access to Inclusion Talks, our Internal panel discussions</li> <li>Free, global mental health benefits for employees and dependents age 6+</li> <li>Competitive global benefits</li> </ul> <p><br><em>Benefits and Growth listed above may vary based on the country of your employment and the nature of your employment with Datadog.<br><br><br>To conform to US export control regulations, candidates should be eligible for any required authorizations from the US government. This job is available in various departments within our company; to conform to US export control regulations, some of these roles may require candidates to be eligible for any required authorizations from the US government.<br><br><br><br></em></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>Datadog offers a competitive salary and equity package, and may include variable compensation. Actual compensation is based on factors such as the candidate's skills, qualifications, and experience. In addition, Datadog offers a wide range of best in class, comprehensive and inclusive employee benefits for this role including healthcare, dental, parental planning, and mental health benefits, a 401(k) plan and match, paid time off, fitness reimbursements, and a discounted employee stock purchase plan.</p></div><div class="title">The reasonably estimated yearly salary for this role at Datadog is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$187,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$240,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><hr> <p><strong>About Datadog:&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) is a global SaaS business, delivering a rare combination of growth and profitability. We are on a mission to break down silos and solve complexity in the cloud age by enabling digital transformation, cloud migration, and infrastructure monitoring of our customers’ entire technology stacks. Built by engineers, for engineers, Datadog is used by organizations of all sizes across a wide range of industries. Together, we champion professional development, diversity of thought, innovation, and work excellence to empower continuous growth. Join the pack and become part of a collaborative, pragmatic, and thoughtful people-first community where we solve tough problems, take smart risks, and celebrate one another. Learn more about #DatadogLife on <a href="https://www.instagram.com/datadoghq/?hl=en" target="_blank">Instagram</a>, <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/datadog" target="_blank">LinkedIn,</a> and <a href="https://learn.datadoghq.com/" target="_blank">Datadog Learning Center. </a></p> <hr> <p data-renderer-start-pos="215"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Equal Opportunity at Datadog:</strong></p> <p>Datadog is proud to offer <a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf" target="_blank">equal employment opportunity</a> to everyone regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, veteran status, and other characteristics protected by law. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. Here are our <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/candidate-legal-notices/" target="_blank">Candidate Legal Notices</a> for your reference.&nbsp;</p> <p>Datadog endeavors to make our Careers Page accessible to all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please complete <a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeoJeduEZ2NdZF_65uZmWUrCM-zee7yADXX1s6Xr9zAGq8iKA/viewform" target="_blank">this form</a>. jobs.title: Manager I, Engineering - CodeGen
jobs.description: <p>Datadog’s CodeGen team builds systems that use AI to <strong>read, understand, generate, and safely change real code</strong> — powering automated fixes, CI/PR automation, agentic remediation, and Infrastructure-as-Code workflows. The team ties code understanding to observability so assistants can explain problems and produce safe, auditable code changes.<br><br></p> <p>We’re a new team building AI-assisted tools to make Datadog developers more effective, by autonomously generating tests, fixing bugs, and improving performance.</p> <p><br>We’re looking for a product-minded generalist to help us quickly define and ship products that make all Datadog customers 10x developers.<br><br></p> <p><em>At Datadog, we place value in our office culture - the relationships and collaboration it builds and the creativity it brings to the table. We operate as a hybrid workplace to ensure our Datadogs can create a work-life harmony that best fits them.</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead a team of engineers responsible for building production systems that enable code understanding and automated code changes — from parsers and telemetry ingestion to model serving, evaluation, and PR automation.</li> <li>Drive technical direction and execution: set a clear roadmap, prioritize work, remove blockers, and raise quality and reliability bar for codegen features (safety, correctness, performance).</li> <li>Partner with product, applied research, infra/SRE, security, and other engineering teams to ship end-to-end experiences that safely apply model outputs (PRs, CI checks, automated apply flows).</li> <li>Build and maintain robust evaluation and monitoring pipelines (offline and online) to measure model quality, drift, and downstream correctness of code changes.</li> <li>Own hiring, performance development, 1:1s, and career growth for your reports; grow a high-performing, inclusive team.</li> <li>Be accountable for production readiness: on-call expectations, postmortems, SLIs/SLOs, and operational playbooks for codegen services.</li> <li>Maintain engineering rigor around data pipelines, model inputs, determinism, reproducibility, and reproducible CI/CD for model + infra changes.<br><br></li> </ul> <p><strong>Who You Are:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Proven experience in software engineering and applied science, with a focus on engineering LLM-based systems in production</li> <li>Demonstrated experience managing small teams of software engineers and/or applied scientists, with a track record of delivering high-quality products</li> <li>Strong software development skills and proficiency in Python and Go</li> <li>Strong understanding of machine learning theory, statistics, and fundamentals</li> <li>Excellent communication abilities to convey complex technical concepts clearly</li> <li>A collaborative mindset and proven experience in working in cross-functional teams</li> <li>A proactive approach with a passion for continuous learning and innovation</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to use AI coding tools in day-to-day workflows and validate, critique, and refine AI-generated output</li> <li>You’re motivated to push the boundaries of how AI can improve software engineering best practices and contribute to building AI-enabled products</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><em>Datadog values people from all walks of life. We understand not everyone will meet all the above qualifications on day one. That's okay. If you’re passionate about technology and want to grow your skills, we encourage you to apply.<br><br></em></p> <p><strong>Benefits &amp; Growth:</strong></p> <ul> <li>New hire stock equity (RSUs) and employee stock purchase plan (ESPP)</li> <li>Continuous professional development, product training, and career pathing</li> <li>Intradepartmental mentor and buddy program for in-house networking</li> <li>An inclusive company culture, ability to join our Community Guilds (Datadog employee resource groups)</li> <li>Access to Inclusion Talks, our internal panel discussions</li> <li>Free, global mental health benefits for employees and dependents age 6+</li> <li>Competitive global benefits<br><br></li> </ul> <p><em>Benefits and Growth listed above may vary based on the country of your employment and the nature of your employment with Datadog.</em></p> <p style="color: white;">#LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>Datadog offers a competitive salary and equity package, and may include variable compensation. Actual compensation is based on factors such as the candidate's skills, qualifications, and experience. In addition, Datadog offers a wide range of best in class, comprehensive and inclusive employee benefits for this role including healthcare, dental, parental planning, and mental health benefits, a 401(k) plan and match, paid time off, fitness reimbursements, and a discounted employee stock purchase plan.</p></div><div class="title">The reasonably estimated yearly salary for this role at Datadog is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$187,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$240,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><hr> <p><strong>About Datadog:&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) is a global SaaS business, delivering a rare combination of growth and profitability. jobs.location: Boston, Massachusetts, USA; Denver, Colorado, USA; New York, New York, USA

This role is responsible for ensuring seamless, high-performance Wi-Fi and direct internet access in our global offices and conference room technology, supporting a rapidly growing global enterprise. As Datadog continues to grow rapidly, this role plays a critical part in scaling both the team and network infrastructure to meet increasing demand. This is a hybrid role that sits in global headquarters in New York city and requires three days in the office each week with occasional travel to our offices around the world.<br><br></p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead the global network engineering teams, managing both full-time employees and third-party vendors to ensure consistent and high-quality service delivery for Datadog offices worldwide.</li> <li>Oversee the design, deployment and scaling of office network infrastructure, including Wi-Fi (Cisco Meraki) and edge networking devices (Cisco, Palo Alto, Juniper, and others), ensuring these services operate according to Datadog's defined service level objectives.</li> <li>Define and implement standards, policies, and processes for network infrastructure to ensure security, reliability and scalability.</li> <li>Collaborate with IT Security, Enterprise Technology, and Workplace teams to align network services with broader IT and business objectives.</li> <li>Develop and track operational metrics for service availability, network performance, driving continuous improvement and optimization.<br><br></li> </ul> <p><strong>Who You Are:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>An experienced people manager with at least 2+ years of leadership experience managing teams of network engineers.</li> <li>Proven expertise in Wi-Fi network engineering, including deep knowledge of Cisco Meraki and edge networking solutions from vendors like Cisco, Palo Alto and Juniper.</li> <li>Experience managing large-scale office technology projects in global enterprises with more than 10 offices and 7,000+ employees, ensuring infrastructure keeps pace with rapid company growth.</li> <li>Strong vendor management skills, with experience selecting, jobs.title: Corporate Network Engineering Manager
jobs.description: <h2><strong>Who we are</strong></h2> <h3><strong>About Stripe</strong></h3> <p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone's reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <h3><strong>About the team&nbsp;</strong></h3> <p>At Stripe, managers grow teams and inspire them to do their best work. We’re looking for an enthusiastic and ambitious IT Leader to manage our Corporate Network Team. This is a hands-on role that will continually assess the needs of our fellow Stripes, driving efficiencies and services that improve productivity. This position will lead a global team focused on delivering world-class office networks and self-serve tooling.</p> <p>Stripe is growing rapidly, and with that growth comes a large reliance on technology and our corporate network infrastructure. We are looking for someone comfortable working as part of a globally distributed team and communicating effectively with both technical and non-technical users.</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <p>In this role, you will lead the team responsible for powering the tooling, services, and infrastructure needed to enable Stripe’s scale. You will act as a strategic leader and technical mentor, ensuring our global corporate offices, support centers, and partner networks are designed and operated to the highest standards.</p> <p>On any given day, you might be designing automated provisioning tools, resolving complex undocumented network issues, or collaborating with Security and Engineering teams to implement solutions that support our rapid growth. You will bring a process-driven mindset to the team, establishing metrics to track operational efficiency and ensuring our network remains resilient and scalable.</p> <h3><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Team Leadership: Manage and grow a global team of network engineers, fostering a culture of excellence and high performance.</li> <li>Network Design &amp; Operations: Design, build, and operate Stripe’s global corporate offices, support centers, partner networks, and PoPs.</li> <li>Automation &amp; Tooling: Help design, build, and deploy automated provisioning, remediation, and telemetry tools to drive efficiency.</li> <li>Operational Excellence: Establish metrics to track operational efficiencies and bring a process-driven mindset to the team.</li> <li>Cross-functional Collaboration: Work closely with Security, Engineering, IT, and Operations teams to develop and implement infrastructure solutions.</li> <li>Technical Support: Resolve complex network issues and provide support through a rotating 24/7/365 on-call schedule.</li> <li>Documentation: Improve and create support procedures and documentation for global network services.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2> <p>We're looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply.</p> <h3><strong>Minimum requirements</strong></h3> <ul> <li>People Management: 2+ years of experience managing direct reports who are geographically dispersed.</li> <li>Technical Expertise: Deep knowledge of routing protocols (BGP), Layer 2 technologies (link/chassis aggregation), and network security (IPSec VPNs).</li> <li>Vendor Proficiency: Hands-on experience with Junos and Juniper routers, switches, and firewall hardware.</li> <li>Automation Skills: Demonstrated success building internal tools and automation at scale using Python or other scripting languages.</li> <li>OS &amp; Troubleshooting: Comfort with Linux/Unix operating systems and the ability to troubleshoot "the life of a packet" from client to server.</li> <li>Execution: Proven ability to handle multiple priorities in high-pressure situations while maintaining a high level of discipline.</li> <li>Communication: Outstanding collaboration skills with the ability to deal patiently with people in a wide variety of situations.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Wireless Expertise: Experience with wireless design and troubleshooting; Aruba experience is a plus.</li> <li>Physical Infrastructure: Experience with enterprise network builds, including wiring standards, gear installation, and circuit procurement.</li> <li>Global Mindset: Excited about the opportunity to travel internationally to support our global footprint.</li> </ul>

jobs.title: EDD Quality Associate
jobs.description: <p><strong>About Stripe</strong></p> <p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world's largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone's reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <p><strong>About the team</strong></p> <p>At Stripe, our Mexico City/Bangalore office is a vibrant hub at the forefront of our mission to reshape the financial landscape for businesses worldwide. Our team prioritizes collaboration, innovation, and excellence. As a member of the team, you'll be part of a mission-driven community dedicated to enhancing the global economy and increasing the GDP of the internet. We strive for excellence by creating with craft and beauty, while having fun and celebrating our successes together.</p> <p>We cultivate a culture of collaboration, inclusivity and support where every team member’s voice matters. Our commitment shines through as we handle over a million support cases each year, empowering our users not just to solve problems but to achieve their goals.</p> <p>This role will be part of the Quality Team within Risk Ops Enablement that is responsible for performing quality checks for the FinCrimes operations team under Risk LOB.</p> <p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p> <p>We are looking for someone who is passionate about fighting financial crimes and is an experienced Quality Analyst to conduct quality reviews and oversee the day- to-day quality assurance of the <em>(AML/EDD/Sanctions/PEP) </em>. We are looking for someone with an eye for detail, is obsessed with quality processes and outcomes, and values efficiency. In this position, you will be responsible for conducting quality audits and providing oversight and maintenance of the process to measure and improve the quality of our Sanctions vertical. The right candidate for this role will have experience in financial crimes, Sanctions, compliance preferably within the fintech, banking or e-commerce space.<br><br></p> <p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li>Develop, research, plan, and conduct quality audits/reviews in accordance with applicable policies and procedures.</li> <li>Be responsible for drafting and circulating detailed weekly/monthly QA reports outlining the QA results and trends observed, clearly articulating any issues noted and remedial actions to be taken.</li> <li>Support functional coaching for new &amp; existing Sanctions associates, wherever applicable.</li> <li>Maintain clear and organized documentation in relation to how Quality Assurance is structured, including sampling logic and coverage of the QA oversight.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Who you are</strong></p> <p>We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</p> <p>Minimum requirements</p> <ul> <li>3+ years of experience in Compliance and Sanctions roles within the financial services or fintech industry and at least 1+ year of experience in Quality Specialist roles.&nbsp;</li> <li>Proven track record of conducting in-depth analysis, including validation of identity documents, address proofs, and income/occupation details, in accordance with the regulatory requirements.&nbsp;</li> <li>Demonstrated strong attention to details.</li> <li>In depth knowledge of quality concepts and analysis.&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience in identifying high-risk customers, transactions, or business activities, and escalating them through right channels.</li> <li>Thorough understanding of&nbsp; Sanctions, KYC, EDD and AML regulations and the ability to apply this knowledge in day-to-day operations.</li> <li>Capacity to work with a sense of urgency and focus.&nbsp;</li> <li>Excellent written, verbal, and interpersonal skills to effectively communicate.&nbsp;&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently, analyze data, and make complex decisions</li> </ul> <p>Preferred Qualifications</p> <ul> <li>Knowledge in payments and the fintech industry&nbsp;</li> <li>Acquired project certifications - Total Quality Management or Six Sigma</li> </ul>

jobs.title: Software Engineer II, Web Platform
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About Pinterest:</strong></p> <p>Millions of people around the world come to our platform to find creative ideas, dream about new possibilities and plan for memories that will last a lifetime. At Pinterest, we’re on a mission to bring everyone the inspiration to create a life they love, and that starts with the people behind the product.</p> <p>Discover a career where you ignite innovation for millions, transform passion into growth opportunities, celebrate each other’s unique experiences and embrace the&nbsp;<a href="https://www.pinterestcareers.com/our-life/pinflex/">flexibility</a> to do your best work. Creating a career you love? It’s Possible.</p> <p>At Pinterest, AI isn't just a feature, it's a powerful partner that augments our creativity and amplifies our impact, and we’re looking for candidates who are excited to be a part of that. To get a complete picture of your experience and abilities, we’ll explore your foundational skills and how you collaborate with AI.</p> <p>Through our interview process, what matters most is that you can always explain your approach, showing us not just what you know, but how you think. You can read more about our AI interview philosophy and how we use AI in our recruiting process <a href="https://www.pinterestcareers.com/our-philosophy-on-ai-in-hiring/">here</a>.</p></div><p>As a Software Engineer on the Web Platform Team, you will drive initiatives that empower developers to build modern, world-class web experiences for Pinners with high productivity, performance, and quality. We're looking for someone who is passionate about front-end, has a growth mindset, and isn't afraid to voice their opinion on how we can improve. You'll find creative solutions to thought-provoking problems, and because we value the kind of courageous thinking required for big bets and smart risks to pay off, you'll create and drive new initiatives from inception through technical design, implementation, and release.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>What you’ll do:</p> <ul> <li>Build the web platform that powers Pinterest.com for hundreds of millions of users - and the frameworks and tooling that empower hundreds of engineers to build it.</li> <li>Improve foundational web architecture, DevEx, builds, CI/CD, and testing capabilities to help developers work more effectively.</li> <li>Identify site-wide challenges; propose, test, and ship solutions.</li> <li>Champion and drive large-scale, cross-functional initiatives that improve the Web platform.</li> <li>Raise web stability, scalability, performance, and accessibility by implementing best-in-class web development standards.</li> <li>Supercharge the web development lifecycle with AI agents: accelerating large-scale migrations, automating repetitive engineering tasks, and building agent-powered workflows that let developers ship faster with higher confidence.</li> <li>Mentor team members and participate actively in technical design and code reviews and architectural decisions.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What we're looking for:</strong></p> <ul> <li>3+ years of experience in Web development and a deep understanding of JavaScript, CSS, DOM, HTTP protocol and how the web works.</li> <li>Expertise with technologies such as React, Redux (or other state management solutions), Relay, GraphQL, TypeScript, Jest and React Testing Library.</li> <li>Good knowledge of build tools such as Webpack, Rspack, or Vite.</li> <li>Familiarity with Node.js, server-side rendering techniques, and frameworks such as Next.js or Remix.</li> <li>Track record of delivering large, cross-functional projects across multiple organizations and being a champion of developer experience, performance and quality.</li> <li>Strong written and verbal communication skills and the ability to collaborate across teams to make platform improvements, test functionality, and evangelize adoption of platform features.</li> <li>Hands-on experience with AI coding agents (eg. Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) and a point of view on how to harness them for large-scale migrations, code generation, and developer workflow automation.</li> <li>Love for Web and drive to keep up-to-date with new technologies, trends and best practices in client architecture.</li> <li>Bachelor’s degree in computer science or equivalent experience.</li> </ul> <p class="p1"><strong>Relocation Statement:</strong></p> <ul class="ul1"> <li class="li1">&nbsp;This position is not eligible for relocation assistance. Visit our <a href="https://www.pinterestcareers.com/pinflex/"><span class="s2">PinFlex</span></a> page to learn more about our working model.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>In-Office Requirement Statement:</strong></p> <ul> <li>We let the type of work you do guide the collaboration style. That means we're not always working in an office, but we continue to gather for key moments of collaboration and connection.</li> <li>This role will need to be in the office for in-person collaboration at least once or twice per quarter/year for onsites.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>#LI-REMOTE<br><span data-sheets-root="1" data-sheets-value="{&quot;1&quot;:2,&quot;2&quot;:&quot;#LI-DG2&quot;}" data-sheets-userformat="{&quot;2&quot;:8705,&quot;3&quot;:{&quot;1&quot;:0},&quot;12&quot;:0,&quot;16&quot;:12}">#LI-DG2</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Our Commitment to Inclusion:</strong></p> <div>Pinterest is an equal opportunity employer and makes employment decisions on the basis of merit. We want to have the best qualified people in every job. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, ancestry, national origin, religion or religious creed, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital status, status as a protected veteran, physical or mental disability, medical condition, genetic information or characteristics (or those of a family member) or any other consideration made unlawful by applicable federal, state or local laws. jobs.title: Partner Development Representative
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>From Fivetran’s founding until now, our mission has remained the same: to make access to data as simple and reliable as electricity. With Fivetran, customer data arrives in their warehouses, canonical and ready to query, with no engineering or maintenance required. We’re proud that more organizations continue to leverage our technology every day to become truly data-driven.</p></div><p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>About the Role</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Fivetran is building data pipelines to power the modern data stack for thousands of companies and we are scaling our co-selling across our Hyperscaler partners, AWS, Azure and Amazon. &nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">We are looking for a Partner Development Manager to join the team and facilitate Fivetran sales engagements across our partners. The Partner Development Manager role is to develop, maintain and execute the process to support our Fivetran sales teams in co-selling alongside AWS, GCP and Azure. &nbsp;This role helps to accelerate our growing sales engagements across these partners resulting in an improved customer experience and mutual revenue growth. The Alliances team is instrumental to the growth at Fivetran and how we as a company go to market and this role is critical to this in achieving alignment with our most strategic partners.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This is a full-time, hybrid position based out of our Oakland, CA office. Our hybrid work model offers a blend of remote flexibility and in-person collaboration, including two days in the office each week to connect and build as a team.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Technologies You’ll Use</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AWS, Azure and Google Cloud partner sales portals, Salesforce, Suger, Google Docs are your primary tools and technologies you’ll be using in the role.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Work with Technology Partner Managers to understand co-sell processes specific to each partner and identify ways to improve support and scale across each partner such as, sales facing resources, system automation and analytical insights useful in successful partner engagements.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Proactively identify top accounts and customers for Fivetran sales teams to partner with at AWS, GCP and Azure.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Facilitate and secure account discussions with partner sales counterparts.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Define, maintain and improve co-sell operational components including sales facing resources, system automation along with analytical insights useful in successful partner engagements.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Connect the dots between Fivetran sales and our partner sales teams to ensure the Fivetran sales team is solution selling with our partners and delivering a delightful customer experience.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Focus on growing revenue growth and pipeline creation across both Fivetran and our Hyperscaler partners.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Assist in managing the sales relationship with the Tech Partner, acting as a liaison between internal teams and the partner sales teams.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Skills We’re Looking For</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">3-5 years of experience in partnerships, sales, or business development roles within a technology company.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Basic understanding of data integration technologies and partnership dynamics.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Strong communication skills, both verbal and written, with an ability to engage various stakeholders.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Proficient in using CRM tools to manage partner interactions.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Demonstrated ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Extremely organized, able to juggle lots of things at once while not letting anything drop and thinking about how to scale and service a growing group of Fivetran sales executives.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">#LI-LW1 #LI-Hybrid</span></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>The compensation range displayed on this job posting reflects the minimum and maximum 10pt;"><strong>Technologies You’ll Use</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AWS, Azure and Google Cloud partner sales portals, Salesforce, Suger, Google Docs are your primary tools and technologies you’ll be using in the role.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Work with Technology Partner Managers to understand co-sell processes specific to each partner and identify ways to improve support and scale across each partner such as, sales facing resources, system automation and analytical insights useful in successful partner engagements.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Proactively identify top accounts and customers for Fivetran sales teams to partner with at AWS, GCP and Azure.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Facilitate and secure account discussions with partner sales counterparts.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Define, maintain and improve co-sell operational components including sales facing resources, system automation along with analytical insights useful in successful partner engagements.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Connect the dots between Fivetran sales and our partner sales teams to ensure the Fivetran sales team is solution selling with our partners and delivering a delightful customer experience.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Focus on growing revenue growth and pipeline creation across both Fivetran and our Hyperscaler partners.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Assist in managing the sales relationship with the Tech Partner, acting as a liaison between internal teams and the partner sales teams.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Skills We’re Looking For</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">3-5 years of experience in partnerships, sales, or business development roles within a technology company.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Basic understanding of data integration technologies and partnership dynamics.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Strong communication skills, both verbal and written, with an ability to engage various stakeholders.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Proficient in using CRM tools to manage partner interactions.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Demonstrated ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Extremely organized, able to juggle lots of things at once while not letting anything drop and thinking about how to scale and service a growing group of Fivetran sales executives.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">#LI-LW1 #LI-Hybrid</span></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>The compensation range displayed on this job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire compensation for the target position and level, and may include sales incentives or target bonuses depending on the role. &nbsp;Our compensation ranges are determined by role, level, and location. Our job titles may span more than one career level. Within the range, individual compensation is determined by additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, relevant education or training, business need, market demands. The compensation range is subject to change and may be modified in the future. Your recruiter can share more about the specific compensation range for your location during the hiring process.</p></div><div class="title">Denver Pay Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$108,568</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$130,287 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">OTE (On Target Earning)</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$155,100.24</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$186,128.01 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>&nbsp;</p> <p class="p-rich_text_section" style="line-height: 1.3;"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">Perks and Benefits</strong></p> <ul> <li>100% employer-paid medical insurance<strong>*</strong></li> <li>Generous paid time-off policy (PTO), plus paid sick time, inclusive parental leave policy, holidays, and volunteer days off</li> <li>RSU stock grants*</li> <li>Professional development and training opportunities</li> <li>Company virtual happy hours, free food, and fun team-building activities</li> <li>Monthly cell phone stipend</li> <li>Access to an innovative mental health support platform that offers personalized care and resources in areas such as: therapy, coaching, and self-guided mindfulness exercises for all covered employees and their covered dependents.</li> </ul> <p style="line-height: 1.3;"><em><strong>*</strong>May vary by country and worker type - please reach out to your recruiter for more information</em></p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;"><em>Click <a href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1CdawUwjo1Q1B7ghZJ_owdmmHB8VtqhBu?usp=sharing" target="_blank">here</a> to learn more about Fivetran's Benefits by Region.</em></p> <hr> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">We’re honored to be <a class="c-link" href="https://fivetran.com/blog/hvr-acquisition-series-d" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://fivetran.com/blog/hvr-acquisition-series-d" data-sk="tooltip_parent">valued at over $5.6 billion</a>, but more importantly, we’re proud of our&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://fivetran.com/culture" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://fivetran.com/culture" data-sk="tooltip_parent">core values of Get Stuck In, Do the Right Thing, and One Team, One Dream</a>. Read about us in&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://fivetran-com.s3.amazonaws.com/news/forbes-aug-sept-2022-digital-reprint-10-21-22.pdf" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://fivetran-com.s3.amazonaws.com/news/forbes-aug-sept-2022-digital-reprint-10-21-22.pdf" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Forbes</a>.&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;</p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">Fivetran brings together high-quality talent across the globe to make data access as easy and reliable as electricity for our customers. We value and recognize that our customers benefit from having innovative teams made of people from many backgrounds, experiences, and identities. Fivetran promotes diversity, equity, inclusion &amp; belonging through attracting, recruiting, developing, and retaining a diverse workforce, not only because it is the right thing to do, but because it helps us build a world-class company to better serve our customers, our people and our communities.</p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">To learn more about Fivetran’s culture and what it’s like to be part of the team, <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xlhtp4dGh8o" target="_blank">click here</a> and enjoy our video.</p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">To learn more about our candidate privacy policy, you can <a href="https://fivetran.com/candidate-privacy" target="_blank">read our statement here</a>.</p> <hr> <p style="line-height: 1.3;"><em>We are committed to ensuring that all candidates have an equal opportunity to participate in our interview process. If you require accommodations at any stage of the process due to a disability, medical condition, or any other circumstance, please don't hesitate to submit your request by filling out this <a href="https://forms.gle/V7k3t4u9j523XkEt6">form</a>. We will work with you to provide reasonable accommodations to facilitate your participation and ensure a fair and accessible interview experience. Your request and any information provided will be kept confidential and will not impact your candidacy. We look forward to hearing from you and accommodating your needs to the best of our ability.</em></p></div>

jobs.title: Mid-Market Account Executive (San Francisco)
jobs.description: <p><strong>Mid-Market Account Executive</strong></p> <p>As an Account Executive on our Mid-Market Sales team, you will assist in Datadog’s overall business growth by strategically engaging and closing net-new customers across mid-to-large size organizations. Sellers follow a well-defined methodology, collaborate with internal stakeholders, identify the customer's unique needs, and clearly convey the value of the Datadog product. Mid-Market reps have the opportunity to grow their careers in Sales and continue contributing to Datadog team success.</p> <p><em>At Datadog, we place value in our office culture - the relationships and collaboration it builds and the creativity it brings to the table. We operate as a hybrid workplace to ensure our Datadogs can create a work-life harmony that best fits them.</em></p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Focus entirely on net-new logo acquisition</li> <li>Convert inbound leads to closed opportunities&nbsp;</li> <li>Leverage tools such as Sales Navigator and DiscoverOrg</li> <li>Strategically prospect into Chief Technology Officers, Engineering/IT Leaders, and technical end users (SRE, DevOps, DevSecOps)</li> <li>Multi-thread into different departments of a complex organization</li> <li>Collaborate with Sales Development Representatives to drive top of funnel activity</li> <li>Manage the full sales cycle, including negotiations and on-site technical demonstrations&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><em>Datadog values people from all walks of life. We understand not everyone will meet all the above qualifications on day one. That's okay. If you’re passionate about technology and want to grow your experience, we encourage you to apply.</em></p> <p><strong>Who You Are:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experienced in hunting and closing net new logos</li> <li>Able to strategically map out and break into large scale organizations</li> <li>Curious, motivated, and driven as a sales person</li> <li>Bold on the phones and creative in your emails</li> <li>Able to sit up to 6 hours, traveling to and from client sites via auto, train, or air, up to 30% of the time</li> </ul> <p><strong>&nbsp;Benefits and Growth:</strong></p> <ul> <li>High income earning opportunities based on self performance</li> <li>Opportunity for Presidents Club</li> <li>New hire stock equity (RSU) and employee stock purchase plan (ESPP)</li> <li>Continuous professional development, product training, and career pathing&nbsp;</li> <li>Sales training in MEDDIC and Command of the Message&nbsp;</li> <li>Intra-departmental mentor and buddy program for in-house networking&nbsp;</li> <li>An inclusive company culture, opportunity to join our Community Guilds</li> <li>Generous global benefits</li> </ul> <p><em>Benefits and Growth listed above may vary based on the country of your employment and the nature of your employment with Datadog.</em></p> <p style="color: white;">#LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>Datadog offers a competitive salary and equity package, and may include variable compensation. Actual compensation is based on factors such as the candidate's skills, qualifications, and experience. In addition, Datadog offers a wide range of best in class, comprehensive and inclusive employee benefits for this role including healthcare, dental, parental planning, and mental health benefits, a 401(k) plan and match, paid time off, fitness reimbursements, and a discounted employee stock purchase plan.</p></div><div class="title">The reasonably estimated yearly salary for this role at Datadog is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$100,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$110,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><hr> <p><strong>About Datadog:&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) is a global SaaS business, delivering a rare combination of growth and profitability. We are on a mission to break down silos and solve complexity in the cloud age by enabling digital transformation, cloud migration, and infrastructure monitoring of our customers’ entire technology stacks. Built by engineers, for engineers, Datadog is used by organizations of all sizes across a wide range of industries. Together, we champion professional development, diversity of thought, innovation, and work excellence to empower continuous growth. Join the pack and become part of a collaborative, pragmatic, and thoughtful people-first community where we solve tough problems, take smart risks, and celebrate one another. Learn more about #DatadogLife on <a href="https://www.instagram.com/datadoghq/?hl=en" target="_blank">Instagram</a>, <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/datadog" target="_blank">LinkedIn,</a> and <a href="https://learn.datadoghq.com/" target="_blank">Datadog Learning Center. </a></p> <hr> <p data-renderer-start-pos="215"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Equal Opportunity at Datadog:</strong></p> <p>Datadog is proud to offer <a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf" target="_blank">equal employment opportunity</a> to everyone regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, veteran status, and other characteristics protected by law. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. Here are our <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/candidate-legal-notices/" target="_blank">Candidate Legal Notices</a> for your reference.&nbsp;</p> <p>Datadog endeavors to make our Careers Page accessible to all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please complete <a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeoJeduEZ2NdZF_65uZmWUrCM-zee7yADXX1s6Xr9zAGq8iKA/viewform" target="_blank">this form</a>. This form is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications.&nbsp;</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="662"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Privacy and AI Guidelines:</strong></p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="662">Any information you submit to Datadog as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Datadog’s&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/applicant-candidate-privacy/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/applicant-candidate-privacy/" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Applicant and Candidate Privacy Notice</a>. jobs.location: Illinois, USA, Remote; Minnesota, USA, Remote
jobs.description: <p>Datadog is seeking a Regional Manager, Sales Engineering to join our high-growth organization and world-class pre-sales team. You will manage a team of talented Sales Engineers to help qualify and close opportunities and coach the team on their approach to providing technical expertise through sales presentations, product demonstrations, and supporting technical evaluations (POCs). This is a hands-on management role where you will take the lead technical role in your region supporting customer facing activities and engagements for key accounts. Enable a strong partnership between the SE team and other organizations within Datadog.</p> <p><em>At Datadog, we place value in our office culture - the relationships and collaboration it builds and the creativity it brings to the table. We operate as a hybrid workplace to ensure our Datadogs can create a work-life harmony that best fits them.</em></p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Partner with the Sales Team to articulate the overall Datadog value proposition, vision and strategy to customers.</li> <li>Manage a team of leaders and individual contributors, helping to ensure customer success pre-sale;</li> <li>Assist recruiting efforts to find and hire top talent within your region. Mentor/coach new hires during on-boarding to ensure proper ramping of skills and capabilities</li> <li>Ensure that your team is enabled to support all required Datadog solutions along with key technical and soft skills</li> <li>Develop a close working relationship with Product Management, Support, and Enablement to ensure continuity between pre and post sales activities</li> <li>Deliver semi-annual performance reviews along with collaborating on and executing individual development plans</li> </ul> <p><strong>Who You Are:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experienced with 1-3+ years in a Sales Engineering team lead or mentorship role and 3+ years in a Sales Engineering or other equivalent client facing role</li> <li>Coachable, with a strong desire to improve and grow as a professional and a demonstrated ability to navigate through change</li> <li>Proven in your ability to grow and develop a team&nbsp;</li> <li>Experienced in recruiting both individual contributors and front line leaders</li> <li>Knowledgeable in current infrastructure and monitoring solutions and technologies</li> <li>Able to build and execute an evaluation plan with a customer and mentor others on how to do so</li> <li>Someone with strong written and oral communication skills. This role requires an ability to understand and articulate both the business benefits (value proposition) and technical advantages of our offering while also coaching others how to do so</li> <li>Able to think strategically and creatively about a wide variety of challenges</li> </ul> <p><em>Datadog values people from all walks of life. We understand not everyone will meet all the above qualifications on day one. That's okay. If you’re passionate about technology and want to grow your skills, we encourage you to apply.</em></p> <p><strong>Benefits and Growth:</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Best-in-breed onboarding</li> <li>Generous global benefits</li> <li>Intra-departmental mentor and buddy program for in-house networking</li> <li>New hire stock equity (RSUs) and employee stock purchase plan (ESPP)</li> <li>Continuous professional development, product training, and career pathing</li> <li>An inclusive company culture, able to join our Community Guilds and Inclusion Talks</li> </ul> <p><em>Benefits and Growth listed above may vary based on the country of your employment and the nature of your employment with Datadog.</em></p> <p style="color: white;">#LI-Remote</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>Datadog offers a competitive salary and equity package, and may include variable compensation.
